name: Toy Chica.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

There have been complaints that Chica's new assets have gotten too... big.

For Morality's Sake, She's an Animatronic in an ADULT ONLY Pizzeria.

Silly little animatronic. She is the Toy Version. I don't wanna hear a thing about Souls in it. There are no souls in the Toy versions of the Animatronics.

~~CLANKCLANKCLANKCLANKCLANK~~
